headline: The Top 5 Analyst Questions From Revvity’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Revvity’s first quarter results were well received by the market, as the company delivered stronger-than-expected organic growth and margins. Management attributed the positive performance to solid execution in both the Life Sciences and Diagnostics segments, with particular momentum in reagents, instruments, and reproductive health. CEO Prahlad Singh highlighted that “the better-than-anticipated revenue and margin performance” reflected resilience across key customer groups, including pharma, b
